title: QuantumScape Sinks 14%, Solid Power and SES AI Fall as Solid-State Battery Stocks Slide
excerpt: QuantumScape just posted an earnings beat and announced a marquee Honda partnership, yet the stock is cratering anyway, dragging Solid Power and SES AI down...
content_html:
David Moadel

Thu, July 23, 2026 at 10:37 AM CDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • QS sank 14% in a sell-the-news reaction despite beating Q2 loss estimates and announcing a Honda solid-state battery partnership, pulling SLDP down 8%.

  • Bears cite no near-term revenue and manufacturing execution risk, while bulls see QuantumScape's technology unlocking EVs, AI data centers, and defense markets.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and QuantumScape didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

QuantumScape (NYSE:QS) shares are down 14% to $5.03 in Thursday morning trading, extending a rough stretch for the solid-state battery developer. The move follows the company's Q2 2026 earnings release after the July 22 close.

The selling is spreading across the small solid-state battery cohort. Solid Power (NASDAQ:SLDP) stock is down 8% to $2.15, and SES AI (NYSE:SES) shares are down 10% to $0.53.

The broader tape isn't helping. For QuantumScape and its peers SLDP and SES, the S&P 500 is down 1.5% and the NASDAQ 100 is down 2.4% on Thursday, a risk-off backdrop that tends to punish high-beta, speculative names the hardest.

Post-Earnings Reaction Drives QuantumScape Lower

QuantumScape posted a Q2 2026 net loss of approximately $98 million, or $0.16 per share, narrower than the $0.1781 loss analysts expected. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted EBITDA loss guidance of $250 million to $275 million while trimming capital-expenditure plans to $27 million to $37 million from a prior $40 million to $60 million range.

Beyond the numbers, QuantumScape broadened its focus beyond electric vehicles. Management highlighted a multi-year partnership with Honda Motor (NYSE:HMC) for solid-state lithium-metal battery technology, updated milestones with Volkswagen's (OTC:VWAGY) PowerCo unit, and initial QSE-5 cell shipments to a major American defense prime alongside engagement with AI data center design partners.

QuantumScape's operating expenses also improved, falling to $106 million from $124 million a year ago, with research and development at $83 million. Customer billings reached $10.8 million in the quarter, per the 8-K filing.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and QuantumScape didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The reaction looks like a classic sell-the-news response. QuantumScape stock was down 44% year to date (YTD) heading into Thursday, and even a headline EPS beat paired with a marquee Honda deal wasn't enough to lift a name where investors want to see actual revenue.

content_html_zh:
大卫·莫德尔

2026 年 7 月 23 日星期四上午 10:37 CDT 阅读时间 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • 尽管 QS 超出第二季度亏损预期并宣布与本田固态电池合作，但在抛售消息反应中，QS 仍下跌 14%，导致 SLDP 下跌 8%。
  • 看空者认为近期收入和制造执行没有风险，而看多者则认为 QuantumScape 的技术将解锁电动汽车、人工智能数据中心和国防市场。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 QuantumScape 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

周四早盘交易中，QuantumScape (NYSE:QS) 股价下跌 14%，至 5.03 美元，延续了这家固态电池开发商的艰难处境。 此前，该公司在 7 月 22 日收盘后发布了 2026 年第二季度财报。

抛售正在蔓延到小型固态电池组。 Solid Power（纳斯达克股票代码：SLDP）股价下跌 8%，至 2.15 美元，SES AI（纽约证券交易所股票代码：SES）股价下跌 10%，至 0.53 美元。

更宽的胶带没有帮助。 对于 QuantumScape 及其同行 SLDP 和 SES 来说，周四标准普尔 500 指数下跌 1.5%，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌 2.4%，这种避险背景往往会惩罚高贝塔系数、投机性股票。

财报发布后的反应导致 QuantumScape 股价下跌

QuantumScape 公布 2026 年第二季度净亏损约为 9800 万美元，即每股 0.16 美元，低于分析师预期的 0.1781 美元亏损。 该公司重申其 2026 年全年调整后 EBITDA 亏损指引为 2.5 亿至 2.75 亿美元，同时将资本支出计划从之前的 4000 万至 6000 万美元削减至 2700 万至 3700 万美元。

除了数字之外，QuantumScape 将其关注范围扩大到电动汽车之外。 管理层强调了与本田汽车 (NYSE:HMC) 在固态锂金属电池技术方面的多年合作伙伴关系、与大众汽车 (OTC:VWAGY) PowerCo 部门的最新里程碑、以及向美国主要国防项目的初始 QSE-5 电池发货以及与人工智能数据中心设计合作伙伴的合作。

QuantumScape 的运营支出也有所改善，从一年前的 1.24 亿美元降至 1.06 亿美元，其中研发支出为 8300 万美元。 根据 8-K 文件，本季度客户账单达到 1080 万美元。

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 QuantumScape 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

这种反应看起来就像是典型的推销新闻反应。 进入周四，QuantumScape 股价今年迄今已下跌 44%，即使每股收益超预期，加上与本田的大笔交易，也不足以提升投资者希望看到实际收入的声誉。
